commit_scope: fourth-kernel.form m4e1 — the north-star walk opened (the existing kernel surface fully present in the fourth sibling, ratcheted by bands runnable on the fourth arm) and its first stone laid: CALL + a function table. Programs become lists of one-param functions flattened into one table; CALL dispatches by index through fk_fn[]; SELF is re-grounded as re-enter fn 0 so single-function programs walk unchanged. Mutual recursion lands at both the recipe level and in the booted binary; the emitter-as-program blocker (the full m4d fixpoint) is removed.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-call-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-walker-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-fixpoint-band.fk
local_validation.summary: fourth-call-band holds three-way at 15: (1) even/odd mutual recursion by CALL index through fkm-run (even(10)=1, even(7)=0); (2) fib via CALL(0) answers 55 AND the old SELF-shaped fib still answers 55 through fkm — SELF == re-enter fn 0, back-compat as a claim; (4) the two-function flatten lands in one 18-row table with roots 8,17; (8) deterministic emission and the single-function emission carries fk_fn[1] — the special case folds in. Prior bands re-proven unbroken (walker 15, fixpoint 15). The audit booted the CALL lane: even(10)=1, even(7)=0, fib-via-CALL(28)=317811 at 19.3 ms median — the CALL indirection priced at ~2.5 ms over the SELF-shaped walker.

observed_delta.north_star_ratchet: bands runnable on the fourth arm: 0 of 424 (the walk just opened)

known_limitations.limitation: Functions take one parameter; multi-arity arrives when a consumer (the emitter-as-program, or the real-recipe bridge) asks, with frames if needed.
known_limitations.follow_up: m4e3's real-recipe flattener will name the actual arity demand from compiled .fk recipes.

known_limitations.limitation: fkc-emit (single-program, root-spliced) and fkc-emit-many coexist; the quine seed still rides the single lane.
known_limitations.follow_up: Migrate the self-printer to emit-many and compost the single lane once the fixpoint canonical moves with it.

known_limitations.limitation: The north-star ratchet starts at 0/424: fkw walks combinator-authored programs, not yet compiled .fk bands.
known_limitations.follow_up: m4e2 arena heap (lists), then m4e3 the observe-door flattener over real recipes — the first real band flipping to four-way is the next measurable click.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run all four fourth-kernel bands three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The fourth sibling gains multi-function programs: CALL by index through an emitted function table, mutual recursion proven at recipe level and booted — the structural prerequisite for walking real kernel-surface recipes and for the emitter authored as a program.
test_flows: fourth-call-band proves mutual recursion, CALL-fib + SELF back-compat, the multi-function flatten shape, and deterministic emission, three-way at 15.
fourth_kernel_audit.sh m4e1 section boots even/odd and fib-via-CALL: parity gates, then the CALL indirection is priced.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh four bands 1 ok 0 divergent each; audit end-to-end boots the CALL lane with parity.

phase_gate.gate: mutual recursion booted with parity; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: m4e2 — lists as an arena heap in the emitted C (cons/head/tail/len/nth/empty), the band subset's structural half
